name: The Ritz London
description:
Step into a world of timeless grandeur at The Ritz London, where over a century of history and British tradition converge in the heart of Piccadilly. Renowned for its exceptional personalised service, the hotel offers an atmosphere of refined elegance, making it the destination of choice for the most discerning guests.

From opulent suites with marble bathrooms and fireplaces to a Two Michelin Star restaurant and the iconic Afternoon Tea, every detail is thoughtfully curated to deliver an unforgettable experience. The Ritz is an unrivalled venue for lavish celebrations, romantic getaways, and once-in-a-lifetime weddings, enveloped in the very essence of London luxury.

Indulge in the legendary Ritz Butler and Chauffeur Services, savour handcrafted cocktails in the Rivoli Bar, or sample rare cigars in the prestigious Cigar Shop & Sampling Lounge. Whether hosting an intimate gathering or a grand celebration, The Ritz London offers the ultimate setting for moments that deserve nothing less than perfection.
short_description: A legendary five-star hotel in the heart of Mayfair, The Ritz London offers a setting of timeless luxury, impeccable service, and exquisite experiences.
amenities: Butler service, Chauffeur service, Michelin-starred restaurant, Afternoon Tea, Cigar Shop & Sampling Lounge, Signature suites, Family rooms, Personalised service, Rolls-Royce Phantom chauffeur, Green policy
seo_title: The Ritz London | Iconic Luxury Wedding Venue in Mayfair
seo_description: Host your wedding at The Ritz London, a legendary five-star hotel in Mayfair. Experience timeless luxury, Michelin-starred dining, and impeccable service.
rooms_description:
Discover a sanctuary of elegance in The Ritz London's rooms and suites, each designed for the utmost comfort and indulgence. From spacious family rooms to opulent Signature Suites adorned with fireplaces and marble bathrooms, every accommodation offers a serene retreat in the heart of the city.

Enjoy personalised service and exquisite views of vibrant Piccadilly, with the promise of an experience that transcends the ordinary and defines the pinnacle of luxury living in London.
dining_description:
The Ritz London is home to a Two Michelin Star restaurant, where culinary excellence is celebrated in an exquisite setting. Guests are invited to indulge in delicately cut sandwiches, beautifully presented pastries, and a world-class Afternoon Tea, all complemented by premium teas and Champagne.

For more intimate occasions, The Ritz Room offers a customised menu featuring seasonal ingredients, while The Rivoli Bar tempts with handcrafted signature cocktails. The Caviar & Champagne Experience and the Cigar Shop & Sampling Lounge further elevate the dining journey, ensuring every moment is an ode to the art of gastronomy.

hero_summary: To cross the threshold of The Ritz London is to enter a world where grandeur is rendered with an effortless grace, and every moment acquires the aura of a cherished memory. Each celebration within its storied walls is imbued with a sense of occasion that lingers long after the last toast is made—a rare alchemy of elegance and intimacy that only such an iconic setting can conjure. Here, the art of hospitality is practiced as a tradition, and every detail, no matter how subtle, is attended to with

name: Six Senses Krabey Island
description: Six Senses Krabey Island is a private island retreat in the Gulf of Thailand, off the coast of Sihanoukville in Cambodia. Set across 20 hectares of lush jungle and crystalline coastline, the island is home to 40 pool villas - overwater, beachfront, and hideaway - all designed with Cambodian materials and a deep sensitivity to the natural landscape. The Six Senses Spa is among the finest in Southeast Asia, blending ancient Khmer healing traditions with contemporary therapies. Dining centres on the AHA Restaurant and the Tree Restaurant, both drawing on the island's own organic garden and the incredible seafood of the Gulf. For weddings and private celebrations, the island can be taken on an exclusive buyout basis, offering total privacy for up to 100 guests.
short_description: Forty overwater and beachfront villas, a world-class spa, and pristine private beaches, exclusively yours.
address: Koh Krabey Island, Preah Sihanouk Province
seo_title: Six Senses Krabey Island - Private Island Wedding and Events Cambodia
seo_description: An entire private island in the Gulf of Thailand. Forty overwater and beachfront villas, world-class spa, vibrant dining. Exclusive island buyout available for weddings and celebrations.

questions.a: Yes. Six Senses Krabey Island can be taken on a full buyout basis, giving you exclusive access to all 40 villas, every beach, the spa, and all dining areas. The island accommodates up to 100 guests.
questions.q: Can we have exclusive use of the whole island?

questions.a: The dry season runs from November to April, offering calm seas, clear skies, and ideal beach conditions. This is the most popular period for weddings.
questions.q: What is the best time of year to get married at Six Senses Krabey Island?

questions.a: The island supports barefoot beach ceremonies, formal pavilion settings, symbolic ceremonies, legal ceremonies with a Cambodian official, and blessing ceremonies.
questions.q: What wedding ceremony styles are available?

questions.a: Yes. Private speedboat transfers from Sihanoukville port are included, and helicopter arrivals can be arranged on request.
questions.q: Can we arrange helicopter or private boat transfers?

questions.a: On a full island buyout, the Six Senses Spa and all its treatment rooms are reserved exclusively for your group throughout your stay.
questions.q: Is the spa available exclusively for our group?

questions.a: All guests have access to snorkelling, kayaking, paddleboarding, the fitness centre, yoga sessions, the Alchemy Bar, and daily guided experiences including Khmer cooking classes and sunset fishing.
questions.q: What activities are included for guests?

rooms_accommodation_type: Private Island Resort — Luxury Pool Villas
rooms_description: Forty pool villas across four categories: Ocean Pool Villa Suites, Beachfront Retreats, Hideaway Pool Villas, and a two-bedroom Oceanfront Villa. Each features Cambodian natural materials, a private pool, outdoor shower, and direct beach or ocean access.
dining_description: Under Executive Chef Todd Adams, dining at Six Senses Krabey Island centres on the island's own organic garden and the pristine waters of the Gulf of Thailand. The AHA Restaurant offers all-day pan-Asian dining — light, inventive menus built around the freshest local produce and seafood sourced daily from local fishermen. The Tree Restaurant takes a more intimate approach: elegant Khmer-inspired seafood, served open-kitchen style beneath the jungle canopy. For weddings and private celebrations, Chef Adams and the team create fully bespoke experiences — from candlelit boardwalk suppers to immersive Khmer cooking journeys.

name: Waddesdon Manor
description:
Waddesdon Manor, an exquisite French Renaissance château set amidst the rolling Hertfordshire countryside, invites couples to celebrate their union in a world of unparalleled elegance and historic splendour. The manor’s fairytale silhouette rises above manicured parterres and tranquil woodlands, creating a captivating stage for the most sophisticated celebrations.

From the moment you approach the ornate gates, Waddesdon’s heritage and artistry envelop you. The grand interiors—adorned with gilded ceilings, intricate panelling, and a remarkable collection of fine art—are matched only by the sweeping views from the expansive terraces. Every detail, from the cascading fountains to the soaring ceilings, speaks to a legacy of refined hospitality and luxury.

Couples may host ceremonies and receptions in a selection of evocative spaces, each offering a distinct sense of place. Whether exchanging vows beneath the soft glow of chandeliers in the elegant Dining Room or amidst the scented blooms of the Rose Garden, every moment at Waddesdon feels touched by magic.

For those seeking an exclusive, deeply personal experience, the manor’s dedicated team orchestrates bespoke celebrations, ensuring every nuance reflects the couple’s vision. At Waddesdon Manor, timeless romance and contemporary luxury blend seamlessly, promising memories as enduring as the estate itself.
short_description: A French Renaissance château nestled in Hertfordshire, Waddesdon Manor offers a breathtaking backdrop and refined grandeur for an unforgettable wedding celebration.
amenities: Historic manor, Formal gardens, Private dining rooms, Exclusive use, On-site event coordination, Customised menus, Parking, Outdoor ceremony spaces
seo_title: Waddesdon Manor Wedding Venue Hertfordshire | Luxury Events
seo_description: Host your wedding at Waddesdon Manor, Hertfordshire’s premier château venue. Discover exclusive elegance, breathtaking gardens, and bespoke celebrations.
rooms_description:
While Waddesdon Manor itself does not provide overnight accommodations within the main house, select partner properties and charming guest lodges nearby offer luxurious stays for wedding parties and guests. These handpicked accommodations blend classic English elegance with modern comforts, ensuring a restful retreat after an unforgettable day.

Couples and their closest guests enjoy exclusive touches, from welcome hampers to bespoke turndown services, creating an atmosphere of intimacy and indulgence befitting a celebration of this calibre.
dining_description:
Culinary artistry is at the heart of the Waddesdon experience. The manor’s in-house chefs craft inspired menus that celebrate the finest seasonal ingredients, many sourced from local Hertfordshire producers and the estate’s own gardens. Each dish is a testament to contemporary British cuisine, beautifully presented and tailored to your tastes.

Guests dine in an atmosphere of refined opulence, whether within the gilded salons or beneath a marquee overlooking the illuminated manor. The wine list draws from the legendary Rothschild cellars, offering pairings that elevate every moment of your celebration.
exclusive_use_description: When you secure Waddesdon Manor for exclusive use, the estate becomes your private sanctuary, ensuring absolute privacy and attentive service throughout your celebration. This unique privilege allows you and your guests to savour every moment within the manor’s storied walls and gardens, crafting an experience that is both intimate and extraordinary.

name: Domaine des Etangs
description:
Founded as a fortified residence by the Dukes of Aquitaine in the 13th century, Domaine des Etangs has evolved over seven hundred years — from an aristocratic stronghold to a wheat farm, from a neglected ruin to one of France's most celebrated private estates.

After a transformative restoration under Garance Primat — who closed the property entirely in 2013 to reimagine it as a living work of art — the Domaine reopened in 2015 as a five-star hotel. Today, it is managed by Auberge Collection, celebrated as Travel + Leisure's No. 2 hotel in France.

Set within 1,000 hectares (2,500 acres) of private forests, meadows, lakes, and parkland, the estate is home to 29 rooms and cottages, a one-Michelin-star restaurant, an indoor pool and spa, a potager garden, and a rotating programme of site-specific art installations.
short_description: Founded as a fortified residence by the Dukes of Aquitaine in the 13th century, Domaine des Etangs has evolved across seven hundred years.
seo_title: Elegant Wedding Venue at Domaine des Etangs, Charente France
seo_description: Discover Domaine des Etangs in Massignac, Charente—an exclusive wedding venue in France for couples seeking refined luxury and timeless elegance.
rooms_description: At Domaine des Etangs, guest accommodations transcend the ordinary, inviting wedding guests into a realm where comfort is elevated by exquisite design and a profound sense of tranquillity. Each room serves as a private sanctuary, seamlessly blending understated elegance with an atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal. Here, every detail is thoughtfully curated, ensuring that each guest is enveloped in an ambience that enhances the significance of the wedding celebration.

dining_description: At Domaine des Etangs, every dining experience is a celebration of provenance and artistry, seamlessly intertwined with the rhythms of the surrounding landscape. Here, the table is not merely a place to gather, but a stage upon which the region’s finest produce is elevated with reverence and finesse. Each ingredient is carefully sourced, reflecting a thoughtful partnership with nature and a devotion to the integrity of the land. The resulting cuisine is a testament to the estate’s ethos: authentic, deeply rooted, and quietly luxurious.

name: Grand Tirolia Kitzbuehel
description:
Perched above Kitzbühel at an elevation of 800 metres, Grand Tirolia has been the benchmark for Alpine luxury since 1895. With five dedicated wedding spaces, a two-Michelin-starred kitchen, and an 18-hole championship golf course, it offers something no other estate in Europe can replicate — a complete world unto itself.

Grand Tirolia began as a hunting lodge for a Tyrolean aristocrat who understood that the most important thing a host can do is make their guests feel that no detail was left to chance. That philosophy has informed every renovation, every appointment, and every hire since.

Today, the estate comprises 98 rooms and suites, five event spaces, five dining concepts, a championship golf course, and a spa that regularly tops the European wellness rankings. But the soul of the place is unchanged: a genuine commitment to making every guest feel, above all else, extraordinary.
short_description: A five-star Alpine resort in the heart of Kitzbühel, offering bespoke weddings in the soaring Grand Atrium, world-class spa, Michelin-starred dining, and exclusive mountain access year-round.
card_summary: A five-star Alpine resort in the heart of Kitzbühel, offering bespoke weddings in the soaring Grand Atrium, world-class spa, Michelin-starred dining, and exclusive mountain access year-round.
hero_title: Grand Tirolia aerial view, Kitzbühel, Austria
seo_title: Grand Tirolia — Luxury Wedding Venue, Kitzbühel, Austria | Alpine Estate Weddings
seo_description: Grand Tirolia is Europe's most celebrated Alpine wedding estate. 5 event spaces, 98 rooms, 2-Michelin-star dining & 3,000 m² spa. Perched above Kitzbühel, Tyrol, Austria. Exclusive use available.
wedding_weekend_subtitle: A full Alpine wedding experience — arrival to farewell
faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about hosting your wedding at Grand Tirolia.
faq_cta_subtext: Our dedicated wedding team will respond within 24 hours.

questions.answer: The Grand Atrium accommodates up to 450 guests for a seated dinner. The Grand Ballroom holds 280 guests. For a combined cocktail reception across all spaces, Grand Tirolia can comfortably accommodate up to 600 guests.
questions.question: What is the maximum guest capacity at Grand Tirolia?

questions.answer: Yes. Grand Tirolia offers multiple ceremony locations — the Eichenheim Terrace for outdoor ceremonies, a private chapel, and the Grand Ballroom for indoor ceremonies. The reception and dinner then flow naturally into the Grand Atrium.
questions.question: Can we hold both the ceremony and reception at Grand Tirolia?

questions.answer: Yes. Grand Tirolia is available for full exclusive use — all 98 rooms and suites, five event spaces, and all dining concepts exclusively for your wedding party. Minimum three-night stay required. Please enquire for exclusive use pricing.
questions.question: Is exclusive use available?

questions.answer: Grand Tirolia has 98 rooms and suites — including 12 suites with separate living rooms. The Grand Tirolia Suite at 320 m² is the ultimate bridal suite, with a private sauna, fireplace, and panoramic loggia.
questions.question: How many rooms are available for wedding guests?

questions.answer: For exclusive use bookings, a minimum of a 3-night stay applies. For partial buyouts, the estate team will advise on the minimum accommodation requirement based on your chosen spaces and dates.
questions.question: Is there a minimum room booking for weddings?

questions.answer: Yes. The estate has a fully in-house culinary team. Every wedding menu is designed exclusively for your day in collaboration with our executive chef. External catering is not required or permitted.
questions.question: Does Grand Tirolia handle all catering in-house?

questions.answer: Absolutely. Our culinary team accommodates all dietary requirements — vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, dairy-free, nut-free, halal and kosher menus are available upon request with advance notice.
questions.question: Can dietary requirements be accommodated?

questions.answer: Yes. Every wedding booked at Grand Tirolia is assigned a dedicated Wedding Director who manages all planning from first enquiry to final farewell. Your Wedding Director is your single point of contact throughout.
questions.question: Does Grand Tirolia provide a dedicated wedding coordinator?

questions.answer: We recommend enquiring at least 18 months in advance for summer and winter peak dates. However, last-minute bookings for shoulder season dates can occasionally be accommodated — please enquire.
questions.question: What is the booking timeline?

rooms_description: From the 52 m² Deluxe Alpine Room to the 320 m² Grand Tirolia Suite with its private sauna and fireplace — every one of our 98 rooms has been designed to put the landscape first. Wood-panelled walls, hand-woven Alpine textiles, and private balconies overlooking the Kitzbüheler Horn mean your guests wake up already in the Alps.

spaces.name: The Grand Atrium
spaces.description: The centrepiece of Grand Tirolia — a fully customisable event hall with a curved 18-metre LED wall, integrated state-of-the-art sound, and a stage built for performances of any scale. Up to 450 guests for a seated dinner.

spaces.name: The Grand Ballroom
spaces.description: The Ballroom seats 280 guests beneath original Tyrolean plasterwork and cascading crystal chandeliers. Ghost chairs, bespoke linen, and candlelit tables — the room transforms entirely to match your vision. Perfect for black-tie receptions, dinner dances, and intimate civil ceremonies.

spaces.name: Eichenheim Terrace
spaces.description: The champagne terrace overlooking the Kitzbüheler Alps — ideal for outdoor ceremonies, drinks receptions, and pre-dinner gatherings. Available for private hire.

spaces.name: The Golden
spaces.description: Tufted velvet sofas, shelves of rare single malts, and a curved bar hand-finished in Austrian pine — The Golden is Grand Tirolia's jazz club and cocktail bar. Live acts every weekend, available for intimate late-night wedding receptions.

spaces.name: The Cooper Bar
spaces.description: Stone walls, arched brass mirrors, green leather banquettes — the Cooper Bar is Grand Tirolia's most unexpected room. Available for private hire as part of your wedding evening.

contact_profile.bio: Our dedicated wedding team has been crafting unforgettable Alpine celebrations since 1895. We respond to all enquiries within 24 hours.

contact_profile.title: Wedding Director, Grand Tirolia

summary: Europe's most celebrated Alpine wedding estate — where the mountains are not a backdrop, they are part of the ceremony.
exclusive_use_description: Grand Tirolia is available for full exclusive use — all 98 rooms, five event spaces, five dining concepts, the spa, the golf course, and every staff member dedicated entirely to your wedding party. Available for three-night minimum stays.

name: GVE Weddings & Villas
description:
Discover the timeless charm of Country Relais & Spa Le Capanne, a beautifully restored 100+ year-old Tuscan farmhouse set amidst 100 acres of tranquil private land. Surrounded by rolling hills and golden fields, this exclusive estate provides a captivating backdrop for sophisticated destination weddings.

With over 35 years of expertise, the family behind Le Capanne delivers a seamless, highly personalised experience—combining certified wedding planning, renowned catering, an artisanal pastry shop, and a full-service bar program. Every celebration is meticulously curated, ensuring each detail reflects your vision and the essence of Tuscany.

The villa accommodates up to 22 guests in nine elegant en-suite bedrooms, blending comfort and understated luxury. Guests enjoy amenities such as air conditioning, Wi-Fi, an indoor jacuzzi, an in-ground pool with a pool house, and inviting outdoor spaces featuring a wood-burning pizza oven, BBQ, and fire pit.

Host exclusive outdoor weddings and events for up to 150 guests, with the estate guaranteeing complete privacy and extended celebrations. Enjoy the freedom of transparent pricing, no corkage fees, and complimentary symbolic ceremonies, set against the enchanting Tuscan landscape.
short_description: An exclusive Tuscan estate offering breathtaking countryside views, refined accommodation, and seamless destination weddings for up to 150 guests.

seo_title: GVE Weddings & Villas: Luxury Italian Destination Weddings
seo_description: Discover GVE Weddings & Villas—where refined elegance meets exclusive venue experiences for couples seeking an unforgettable luxury wedding celebration.

nearby_items.title: Protected natural reserve and walking paths

rooms_description:
At GVE Weddings & Villas, guest accommodations are conceived as tranquil sanctuaries, seamlessly woven into the fabric of each wedding celebration. Every detail, from the thoughtfully appointed interiors to the enveloping sense of privacy, is designed to elevate each guest's stay, ensuring comfort that is both refined and deeply personal.

The ambience evokes a space where time slows, allowing guests to savour every moment of connection—whether in quiet reflection or joyful anticipation of the festivities to come. The accommodations at GVE Weddings & Villas are more than a place to rest; they serve as an extension of the event itself. spaces where cherished memories are made and the spirit of celebration lingers long after the last toast.

Here, the transition from day to night is effortlessly graceful, enveloped in an understated elegance that underscores the significance of the occasion. For couples seeking an experience that marries exclusivity with heartfelt hospitality, GVE’s guest accommodations are integral to a wedding journey marked by warmth, serenity, and timeless sophistication
dining_style: farm-to-table, bespoke menus, multi-course dinners, al fresco feasts
dining_description:
At GVE Weddings & Villas, the dining experience is conceived as an essential expression of celebration and artistry, where every meal becomes an intimate chapter in your wedding story. Here, the culinary journey is meticulously curated, with each dish reflecting a harmonious balance of quality and provenance.

The emphasis is placed on the thoughtful selection of ingredients—each element chosen for its freshness, purity, and ability to evoke a sense of place. Every course is elegantly composed, revealing a reverence for both tradition and innovation, and ensuring that each bite lingers as a cherished memory.

The relationship between cuisine and setting at GVE Weddings & Villas is one of seamless synergy; the ambience, marked by understated luxury, invites guests to savour not only the flavours of the table but the rarefied atmosphere that surrounds them. Couples and their guests are enveloped in an experience where every detail, from presentation to palate, is orchestrated with care and artistry, transforming dining into a sensorial celebration. Here, the table becomes a gathering place for joy, connection, and the creation of enduring memories—an embodiment of the venue’s unwavering commitment to excellence and exclusivity.

media_items.title: Elena & Dawid (Wedding Film)
media_items.caption:
Elena & Dawid - Wedding in Tuscany
From the Netherlands to Italy, a dream brought to life.

Elena and Dawid chose to leave the Netherlands to celebrate their love in the heart of Tuscany, surrounded by the quiet beauty and golden light of the hills near Volterra.
The stunning Le Capanne Country Relais set the scene for an elegant day filled with smiles and genuine emotions, in one of the most iconic landscapes in Italy.

A celebration that brought together family, friends, and the warm atmosphere of a late September afternoon, as this wonderful couple said “yes” on September 23rd.

Film by Antonio Bartalozzi
Camera Operators: Antonio Bartalozzi & Andrea Vignali
Volterra Wedding Photographers

name: Orchardleigh House
description:
Set amidst 500 acres of verdant parkland in the heart of the Somerset countryside, Orchardleigh House stands as a testament to Victorian opulence and aristocratic heritage. This private, family-owned estate envelops guests in an atmosphere of distinguished elegance, where sweeping lawns, tranquil lakes, and ancient woodlands create an ethereal canvas for the most discerning couples.

The stately home itself is a masterpiece of architectural grace, its grand façade and period interiors exuding an air of refined romance. Marble fireplaces, crystal chandeliers, and gilded detailing frame each space, inviting guests to revel in the rarefied ambiance of a bygone era while enjoying every modern luxury.

Orchardleigh House is more than a venue—it is a sanctuary for bespoke celebrations. With exclusive use of the entire estate, couples can craft a wedding experience entirely their own, from intimate gatherings in the private chapel to lavish receptions within the house's stately halls or on the sunlit terraces overlooking the grounds.

Exceptional service, privacy, and flexibility underpin every occasion at Orchardleigh House, ensuring that each moment unfolds with effortless grace and timeless sophistication.
short_description: Orchardleigh House is an enchanting Somerset estate where timeless grandeur meets refined exclusivity, offering an idyllic backdrop for unforgettable celebrations.
amenities: Private chapel, Helicopter landing, 41 bedrooms, On-site catering, Golf course, Lakeside views, Exclusive use, Bridal suite, Event planning services, Historic ballroom
seo_title: Orchardleigh House – Luxury Wedding Venue in Somerset
seo_description: Host your dream wedding at Orchardleigh House in Somerset, an exclusive-use estate offering timeless elegance, exquisite dining, and enchanting event spaces.
seo_keywords: ["luxury wedding venue somerset","exclusive use estate wedding","historic wedding venue england","orchardleigh house weddings","country house wedding somerset","private chapel wedding venue","english countryside wedding","destination wedding england"]
rooms_description:
Orchardleigh House offers 41 luxurious bedrooms, each thoughtfully restored to preserve the estate’s historic charm while providing modern comforts. From opulent suites with four-poster beds and sweeping views to inviting guest rooms adorned with period furnishings, every space promises tranquility and indulgence.

The wedding night suite, a sanctuary of romance, offers newlyweds a private retreat imbued with elegance, ensuring a serene and memorable conclusion to the day’s celebrations.
dining_description:
The culinary journey at Orchardleigh House is a celebration of seasonal British produce, artfully interpreted by a talented team of chefs. Each menu is thoughtfully tailored, drawing inspiration from local farms, artisan purveyors, and the estate’s own gardens to create dishes that are both sumptuous and exquisitely presented.

Whether hosting a grand banquet in the elegant dining hall or a relaxed lakeside luncheon, couples and their guests are treated to a gourmet experience that balances tradition with contemporary flair, enhanced by impeccable service and a refined atmosphere.
exclusive_use_description: Enjoy the ultimate in privacy and prestige with exclusive use of Orchardleigh House and its estate. Every corner is yours to personalise, ensuring an intimate experience that is truly your own. For luxury couples seeking unparalleled exclusivity, the estate becomes a private haven for your celebration.
